title: Token-opt: RTK-style command-aware tool-output compression via phase-agent PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks — tokens never paid at the source
summary: Phase agents burn transcript tokens on raw go test/git/find output. Add hook-based compression for the top commands (go test pass -> one line; git status -> short delta; head+tail elision with markers for the rest, per-message token cap AG2-style). Published: avg -89 percent CLI output noise (cargo test -91.8, git status -80.8); masking-class savings -52.7 percent cost with BETTER solve rate. GATED: defer until token-telemetry-s7 ships (measured baseline re-ranks these by actual top consumers). Research: knowledge-base/research/token-concurrency-2026/ (oss.md 12, 1, 6).
acceptance: Hook config shipped in phase-agent settings projection; go test green-run output compresses to summary line (fixture test)
no correctness regression: failing-test output NEVER truncated below actionable detail
